intro: Metanarthecium brachyphyllum, also known as Lycium chinense or Chinese boxthorn, is a type of shrub native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. Bioactive constituents of Metanarthecium brachyphyllum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
